# LangfuseDotnet

> A .NET SDK (v0.8.0) for Langfuse LLM observability. Uses OpenTelemetry with
> Gen AI semantic conventions to trace LLM calls, embeddings, tool calls, and
> agent workflows. Also provides a full HTTP client for the Langfuse REST API.
> Targets .NET 8.0, 9.0, and 10.0. NuGet: zborek.LangfuseDotnet

## Quick Start
- [Installation & DI Setup](llms-full.txt#installation): Register via AddLangfuseExporter and AddLangfuseTracing
- [Configuration](llms-full.txt#configuration-reference): appsettings.json or programmatic setup for both OTel exporter and API client

## Tracing (OpenTelemetry)
- [IOtelLangfuseTrace](llms-full.txt#iotellangfusetrace--scoped-trace-service-di): Scoped trace service — StartTrace, CreateGeneration, CreateSpan, CreateToolCall, CreateEmbedding, CreateAgent, CreateEvent
- [OtelLangfuseTrace Direct](llms-full.txt#otellangfusetrace--direct-instantiation-no-di): Direct instantiation without DI, including detached traces for parallel work
- [Observation Types](llms-full.txt#observation-types): OtelSpan, OtelGeneration, OtelEmbedding, OtelToolCall, OtelAgent, OtelEvent
- [Generation Parameters](llms-full.txt#otelgeneration--llm-calls): SetTemperature, SetMaxTokens, SetInputMessages, SetResponse, SetUsageDetails, SetCostDetails
- [Skip Pattern](llms-full.txt#skip-pattern): Skip individual observations or entire traces (e.g. cache hits)

## API Client
- [ILangfuseClient](llms-full.txt#ilangfuseclient--rest-api): Full Langfuse REST API — 22 domain areas
- [Prompts](llms-full.txt#prompts): GetPromptAsync, CreatePromptAsync — version-controlled prompt templates
- [Datasets](llms-full.txt#datasets): CRUD for datasets, dataset items, and dataset run items
- [Scores](llms-full.txt#scores): CreateScoreAsync, GetScoreListAsync — evaluation scoring
- [Traces & Observations](llms-full.txt#traces): Query and manage traces and observations
- [Sessions](llms-full.txt#sessions): Group traces into user sessions
- [All API Domains](llms-full.txt#annotation-queues): Comments, Models, Media, Metrics, AnnotationQueues, Organization, Project, SCIM, Health, BlobStorage, LlmConnections

## Testing
- [No-Op Implementation](llms-full.txt#testing): AddLangfuseTracingNoOp() for unit tests
